steps.title: Use the causal signal
steps.content: The passage says Mohol bushbabies display the opposite pattern from gerbils, "as" their reliance on visual foraging creates a different reward-risk balance. The reference explains why the bushbabies respond differently.

steps.title: Reject unsupported functions
steps.content: Choice A adds speed, which is not discussed. Choice C says the behavior is inconsistent with cost-benefit logic, but the phrase explains that logic. Choice D shifts back to gerbils rather than bushbabies. The answer is B.
